Håkan has worked with requirements, DW/BI architecture and to develop data warehouses, ETL, analysis and reporting solutions in Microsoft-based BI environments with SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS and Power BI.
He has a great number of certifications, where the latest are Power BI Data Analyst Associate, Azure Fundamentals and SAFe 5 Agilist.

knowledge_evidence: The assignment essentially consisted of migrating existing applications from a mono-repository model, with tightly connected applications, to a more distributed microservices model with all APIs and data available through Microsoft Azure's cloud services.

hårt sammankopplade applikationer, till en mer distribuerad microservices-modell med alla APIer och data tillgängliga genom Microsoft Azures molntjänster.

Uppdraget bestod i huvudsak av att migrera existerande applikationer från en monorepository-modell, med hårt sammankopplade applikationer, till en mer distribuerad microservices-modell med alla APIer och data tillgängliga genom Microsoft Azures molntjänster.

Rather than promoting fixed frameworks, Johan draws from agile principles, lean thinking, and hands-on experience with models such as Kanban, Scrum, Enterprise Service Planning, and various scaled delivery structures.
